title: First Sector Dive
summary: The player dives into the first Sector through the stabilized Threshold Gate. The environment is partially corrupted, with flickering terrain and unstable nodes. The Sector Guardian is missing or weakened. The player must explore the area, stabilize the first real-world node, and confront a corrupted creature that blocks the path deeper into the Sector.
steps: Locate the missing or weakened Guardian
objectives: Locate the missing or weakened Guardian
